must_have_quals: You have experience developing backend systems using Java, You know how to design APIs and work with service-based architectures, You write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code, You care about performance, scalability, and system reliability, You enjoy working collaboratively in cross-functional teams, You are curious, proactive, and motivated to learn and grow, You have experience contributing to production systems, You are driven to leverage AI to improve our systems, and eager to find practical ways to apply it
